mapper.select:
SELECT CONCAT(g.id, '_', si.attr, '_', w.id) AS groupKey, g.name AS goodsName, si.attr AS attr, w.name AS warehouseName, o.name AS frameName, c.name AS customerName, s.time AS time, s.number AS number, s.arrival AS arrival, s.state AS orderState, si.unit AS unit, si.price AS price, si.nums AS nums, si.total AS total, si.data AS itemRemark, CASE WHEN si.handle <= 0 THEN 0 WHEN si.handle >= si.nums THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS itemState, (si.nums - si.handle) AS unstockedQuantity, (si.nums - si.handle) * si.price AS unstockedAmount, SUM(si.total) OVER (PARTITION BY g.id, si.attr, w.id) AS totalAmount, SUM(si.nums - si.handle) OVER (PARTITION BY g.id, si.attr, w.id) AS totalUnstockedQuantity, SUM((si.nums - si.handle) * si.price) OVER (PARTITION BY g.id, si.attr, w.id) AS totalUnstockedAmount FROM sor s JOIN sor_info si ON s.id = si.pid LEFT JOIN customer c ON s.customer = c.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON si.goods = g.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON si.warehouse = w.id LEFT JOIN frame o ON s.frame = o.id
ORDER BY g.name ASC, si.attr ASC, w.name ASC, s.time DESC

SELECT s.id AS orderId, o.name AS frameName, c.name AS customerName, s.time AS time, s.number AS number, s.state AS state, s.arrival AS arrival, s.data AS orderRemark, si.goods AS goods, g.name AS goodsName, si.attr AS attr, si.warehouse AS warehouse, w.name AS warehouseName, si.unit AS unit, si.price AS price, si.nums AS nums, si.total AS total, si.data AS itemRemark, CASE WHEN si.handle <= 0 THEN 0 WHEN si.handle >= si.nums THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS itemState, (si.nums - si.handle) AS unstockedQuantity, (si.nums - si.handle) * si.price AS unstockedAmount, SUM(si.total) OVER (PARTITION BY s.id) AS totalAmount, SUM(si.nums - si.handle) OVER (PARTITION BY s.id) AS totalUnstockedQuantity, SUM((si.nums - si.handle) * si.price) OVER (PARTITION BY s.id) AS totalUnstockedAmount FROM sor s JOIN sor_info si ON s.id = si.pid LEFT JOIN customer c ON s.customer = c.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON si.goods = g.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON si.warehouse = w.id LEFT JOIN frame o ON s.frame = o.id
ORDER BY s.time DESC, s.id ASC

SELECT CONCAT(g.id, '_', si.attr, '_', w.id) AS groupKey, g.name AS goodsName, si.attr AS attr, w.name AS warehouseName, o.name AS frameName, c.name AS customerName, s.time AS time, s.number AS number, s.arrival AS arrival, s.state AS orderState, si.unit AS unit, si.price AS price, si.nums AS nums, si.total AS total, si.data AS itemRemark, CASE WHEN si.handle <= 0 THEN 0 WHEN si.handle >= si.nums THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS itemState, (si.nums - si.handle) AS unstockedQuantity, (si.nums - si.handle) * si.price AS unstockedAmount, SUM(si.total) OVER (PARTITION BY g.id, si.attr, w.id) AS totalAmount, SUM(si.nums - si.handle) OVER (PARTITION BY g.id, si.attr, w.id) AS totalUnstockedQuantity, SUM((si.nums - si.handle) * si.price) OVER (PARTITION BY g.id, si.attr, w.id) AS totalUnstockedAmount FROM sor s JOIN sor_info si ON s.id = si.pid LEFT JOIN customer c ON s.customer = c.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON si.goods = g.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON si.warehouse = w.id LEFT JOIN frame o ON s.frame = o.id
ORDER BY g.name ASC, si.attr ASC, w.name ASC, s.time DESC

SELECT s.id AS orderId, o.name AS frameName, c.name AS customerName, s.time AS time, s.number AS number, s.state AS state, s.arrival AS arrival, s.data AS orderRemark, si.goods AS goods, g.name AS goodsName, si.attr AS attr, si.warehouse AS warehouse, w.name AS warehouseName, si.unit AS unit, si.price AS price, si.nums AS nums, si.total AS total, si.data AS itemRemark, CASE WHEN si.handle <= 0 THEN 0 WHEN si.handle >= si.nums THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS itemState, (si.nums - si.handle) AS unstockedQuantity, (si.nums - si.handle) * si.price AS unstockedAmount, SUM(si.total) OVER (PARTITION BY s.id) AS totalAmount, SUM(si.nums - si.handle) OVER (PARTITION BY s.id) AS totalUnstockedQuantity, SUM((si.nums - si.handle) * si.price) OVER (PARTITION BY s.id) AS totalUnstockedAmount FROM sor s JOIN sor_info si ON s.id = si.pid LEFT JOIN customer c ON s.customer = c.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON si.goods = g.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON si.warehouse = w.id LEFT JOIN frame o ON s.frame = o.id
ORDER BY s.time DESC, s.id ASC
